description.description: Brief description of the feature and what it provides

stage.description:
Current release cycle stage of a feature

If a feature's stage value is `EA`, the state is `null` and not returned. If the value is `BETA`, the state is `OPEN` or `CLOSED` depending on whether the `BETA` feature is manageable.

> **Note:** If a feature's stage is `OPEN BETA`, you can update it only in Preview cells. If a feature's stage is `CLOSED BETA`, you can disable it only in Preview cells.

state.description: Indicates the release state of the feature

value.description: Current release stage of the feature

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.
